title: Bounded Workstation-Migration Trial Planning
objective: Define the smallest reversible Olares host trial posture that may follow Packet 011 by specifying scope, guardrails, entry criteria, success criteria, failure and rollback triggers, evidence capture, and whether a small authority-publication step is required first so the post-010 and post-011 closure artifacts are also present on `/home/olares/code/apex` before any host-side trial execution is considered.
dependency_note: Packet 011 concludes that workstation migration is conditionally ready only for a later bounded trial posture. This packet exists to plan that trial precisely and reversibly before any host-side trial execution packet is considered.
required_inputs: The Packet 011 ruling that workstation migration is conditionally ready only for later bounded trial planning
The Packet 010 governing published commit `2e87937c2cd03a92ac8f1ccd4246d0eab0292348` and synchronized `/home/olares/code/apex` host mirror evidence
The Packet 008 host dev-loop smoke evidence for workspace-open and implementation-lane ergonomics
The current workstation-only post-010 and post-011 closure artifacts and routing or roadmap updates
constrained_outputs: A dated planning handoff defining the exact allowed and disallowed actions for a later bounded workstation-migration trial

A recorded decision on whether a small authority publication and host-mirror sync step should occur first so the Packet 010 closure and Packet 011 reassessment artifacts are also present on `/home/olares/code/apex`
No migration approval, no host runtime mutation, no old-clone mutation, and no widening into AI-services, Gitea/code-hosting, or canonical-hosting work
validation_steps: Confirm that Packet 011 completed and that its conditional-readiness conclusion is the controlling lane state.
Define the exact trial posture against `/home/olares/code/apex/apex-power-ops-platform`, including allowed actions, prohibited actions, expected operator posture, and trial duration or stop rules.
Define entry criteria, success criteria, failure triggers, rollback triggers, and required evidence capture for any later host-side trial execution lane.

Decide whether a small authority publication and host-mirror sync step should occur first so the Packet 010 closure and Packet 011 reassessment artifacts are also present on `/home/olares/code/apex` before trial execution.
Preserve the split decision surfaces: no AI-services expansion, no Gitea/code-hosting transition, no canonical-hosting transition, and no host-runtime mutation.
Stop if execution would require migration approval, service changes, auth or ingress changes, installation work, or any mutation of `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes trial planning only. It does not authorize database writes, host-runtime mutation, old-clone mutation, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, or migration approval.
closure_note: Executed as a bounded planning lane. Packet 012 defines the smallest reversible host-editing trial posture and concludes that a small authority publication plus `/home/olares/code/apex` host-mirror resync step should occur before any host-side trial execution.
next_action: Open only a small post-012 authority publication and host-mirror resync gate next. Do not open host-side trial execution, migration approval, host runtime mutation, old-clone mutation, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, or canonical-hosting work from Packet 012 alone.
